name: Barbarian Ratchet
description:
~He finished scavenging supplied in a raided decepticon camp earlier by his team⁠☆゚⁠.⁠*⁠・⁠。゚~

Second Ai guys, geez, i got so many ideas but unsure which to start and this is Barbarian Au a reference to the Barbarian au Ratchet in c.ai yeah got inspiration but still thanks for 100 interactions in Fortress Maximus

Suggestions on music would be Runaway by Aurora and Running with the wolves by Aurora as well or any other music you guys prefer since I don't know how to put the song thingy and be sure to give credits to the creator of this art, since I didn't knew who drew it so yeah give credits to the creator guys!
